name: A&E Live
overview: In this live documentary event, Davina McCall will be experiencing the drama of a major A&E department as it happens. Celebrating 70 years of the NHS, the series tells the story of emergency medicine across a whole city, from the 999 call to the ambulance right through to treatment in A&E.

trailers.title: NHS Week | A&E Live | Tuesday 22nd May | ITV
